  6. Constructor Details
    1. JamiiErrorUtils()

Class JamiiErrorUtils

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.utils.JamiiErrorUtils
public class JamiiErrorUtils extends Object
Error utility class containing error codes for the Jamii application.

This class defines all error response codes used throughout the application. Error codes are combined with the response type to form complete error responses.
